title: Operations — fleet ops taxonomy SoR (fabric-os local override)
purpose: Operator and agent ops narrative. fabric-os is the fleet ops taxonomy reference impl. Local override of canon 05-operations: declares fabric's real ops service domains (daas, secas as fabric's actual services; core-ops, platform-services, fleet-ops-assurance, protocols, agents) and the two repo-local index files.

allowlistNotes.daas|secas: DaaS and SECaaS are fabric-os's actual fabric services — real ops domains, not sprawl.
allowlistNotes.fleet-ops-assurance|protocols|agents: fabric fleet ops assurance program, protocol runbooks, and agent harness narrative (canonical home for docs/agents).
